name: Pressure Alert
description: System pressure building and requesting release

prompts.label: system pressure building and requesting operator release
prompts.text: system pressure building and requesting operator release, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
